heading: Fees and charges
label: 1759 Fees and charges
text: In fiscal year 2009 and each fiscal year thereafter, fees and charges authorized by may be collected only to the extent provided in advance in appropriations Acts.section 9701 of title 31
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Department of the Interior, Environment, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2009, and also as part of the Omnibus Appropriations Act, 2009, and not as part of the Federal Oil and Gas Royalty Management Act of 1982 which comprises this chapter. Section is based on a proviso in the par. under the headings “” and “” in title I of div. E of .Minerals Management Serviceroyalty and offshore minerals managementPub. L. 111–8
